intent: Create a tiny local-only checklist application from scripted user prompts, then branch if the reply is too vague.

foundation.app_context: A local-only checklist app should be produced without deploys, analytics, payments, credentials, or public sends.

steps.label: intent
steps.user_message: I want a tiny local-only checklist app that helps me pick one useful task for today. Keep it safe and do not deploy anything.

steps.label: repair-intent
steps.user_message: Your previous reply was not specific enough. Give me a local-only checklist plan with explicit non-claims and no external actions.

steps.label: build
steps.user_message: Create or describe the minimal static app files for this checklist. If you write files, keep them dependency-free and local-only.

steps.label: qa
steps.user_message: Review the local app proof honestly. What is verified, what is assumed, and what is still blocked?

fixture_replies.label: intent
fixture_replies.text: A local-only checklist app is a safe first slice. It should stay dependency-free, avoid deploys, avoid analytics, avoid payments, and produce only local proof artifacts.

fixture_replies.label: repair-intent
fixture_replies.text: Repair path: local-only checklist, no external actions, no deploy, no analytics, no payment, no credential handling.

fixture_replies.label: build
fixture_replies.text: Build path fixture: create index.html, app.js, and styles.css as dependency-free local-only files. Fixture mode does not actually prove live file generation.

fixture_replies.label: qa
fixture_replies.text: verified: scenario routing and local proof capture. assumed: live agent quality and browser behavior. blocked: deployed proof, real users, retention, revenue, analytics, and payment validation.
